# UC-11.7.3 · Asterisk Queue Log Wait Time Versus SLA Threshold

## Description

Queue wait drives abandons and poor satisfaction. `queue_log` is authoritative for time-to-answer versus IVR timestamps alone.

## Value

Aligns staffing to SLAs and highlights dialplan regressions after upgrades.

## Implementation

(1) Parse queue_log fields for your Asterisk version. (2) Set `sla_seconds`. (3) Alert on p95 or breach rate. (4) Optional join to CDR for abandons.

## SPL

```spl
index=voip sourcetype="asterisk:queue_log" earliest=-24h
| eval ev=coalesce(event, Event, "")
| eval wait=tonumber(coalesce(wait, data2, Wait, hold_time, ""))
| where match(lower(ev), "(?i)connect|completecaller|completeagent") AND isnotnull(wait)
| eval sla_seconds=120
| eval breach=if(wait>sla_seconds,1,0)
| stats avg(wait) as avg_wait p95=perc95(wait) sum(breach) as breaches count as answered by queue
```

## Visualization

Timechart p95; KPI breach %; bar by queue.
